global_description: A medium-sized diving bird with a slender, elongated body and a distinctive red-brown breast. It features a spiky, dark green head with a narrow, serrated orange bill. The back is gray with a white belly, and the wings are patterned with black and white.

part_details.head: Spiky, dark green with a glossy sheen.
part_details.body: Slender, elongated, gray back, white belly.

spatial_relations: The spiky head is positioned at the front of the body.
The narrow bill extends from the front of the head.
The red-brown breast transitions into a white belly.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
